'''pachala''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:reacknowledgment|reacknowledgment]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-ch-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:reacknowledgment|reacknowledgment]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| pachala
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæchælæth|pæchælæth]] || [[word:pæchælæj|pæchælæj]] || [[word:pæchælæsh|pæchælæsh]] || [[word:pæchælæ|pæchælæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pachachalath|pachachalath]] || [[word:pachachalaj|pachachalaj]] || [[word:pachachalash|pachachalash]] || [[word:pachachala|pachachala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pachalath|pachalath]] || [[word:pachalaj|pachalaj]] || [[word:pachalash|pachalash]] || [[word:pachala|pachala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pachaflath|pachaflath]] || [[word:pachaflaj|pachaflaj]] || [[word:pachaflash|pachaflash]] || [[word:pachaflaf|pachaflaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pachalatha|pachalatha]] || [[word:pachalaja|pachalaja]] || [[word:pachalasha|pachalasha]] || [[word:pachalaka|pachalaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pachalath|pachalath]] || [[word:pachalaj|pachalaj]] || [[word:pachalash|pachalash]] || [[word:pachala|pachala]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pachalathal|pachalathal]] || [[word:pachalajal|pachalajal]] || [[word:pachalashal|pachalashal]] || [[word:pachalakal|pachalakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pachalathatha|pachalathatha]] || [[word:pachalajaja|pachalajaja]] || [[word:pachalashasha|pachalashasha]] || [[word:pachalaka|pachalaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pachalathan|pachalathan]] || [[word:pachalajan|pachalajan]] || [[word:pachalashan|pachalashan]] || [[word:pachalakan|pachalakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pachalathaoro|pachalathaoro]] || [[word:pachalajaoro|pachalajaoro]] || [[word:pachalashaoro|pachalashaoro]] || [[word:pachalakaoro|pachalakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
